narrative:
Precinct Bethesda Village (precinct in Belmont County) has 779 registered voters, with 56.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.9 percentage points.
